nodes.label: bun/bunx not on PATH in Windows Claude Code environment
nodes.rationale: Tool-spawned Windows shells get a minimal non-login environment that doesn't replay the user's profile PATH additions (~/.bun/bin), so bun/bunx must be invoked by full path.
nodes.norm_label: bun/bunx not on path in windows claude code environment

nodes.label: cred-grid CSS hardcodes column count to card count
nodes.rationale: .cred-grid uses grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr) hardcoded to the number of .cred cards in page.tsx; adding or removing a card without updating N breaks the layout.
nodes.norm_label: cred-grid css hardcodes column count to card count

nodes.label: graphify CLI not invokable via bun/bunx
nodes.rationale: graphify is not resolvable via PATH nor via `bunx graphify` (no such published bin), which blocked the CLAUDE.md-required post-edit `graphify update .`.
nodes.norm_label: graphify cli not invokable via bun/bunx

nodes.label: playwright-cli vs @playwright/test — two separate tools
nodes.rationale: @playwright/cli is an interactive browser driver; @playwright/test is the .spec test runner. Installing one does not provide the other; global playwright-cli availability is environment-dependent.

nodes.label: Casa Colina site duplicates marketing facts across sections
nodes.rationale: Marketing facts (phone, resident count, license tier) are restated verbatim in 2-5 markup locations plus the twice-duplicated marquee string; grep the fact across app/ before editing one circled instance.
nodes.norm_label: casa colina site duplicates marketing facts across sections

nodes.label: Azure DevOps MCP has no whoami tool — use core_get_identity_ids
nodes.rationale: Unlike GitHub MCP's get_me, the azure-devops MCP server exposes no whoami tool; resolve the current identity via core_get_identity_ids with searchFilter set to the user's email.
nodes.norm_label: azure devops mcp has no whoami tool — use core_get_identity_ids
